results.title: No private hospital transfer for Sonam Wangchuk as court upholds forcible removal
results.description: The Delhi High Court states that at Safdarjung Hospital, Sonam Wangchuk has been administered only oral interventions deemed necessary in light of his ‘deteriorating’ condition, although without his consent.

results.title: Could the keto diet be increasing your cancer risk?
results.description: Researchers said the keto diet was found to suppress tumors in one part of the body but accelerated growth in another.
